hero.subheading: Seven AI agents that produce videos, post your social media, answer calls, generate leads, and dominate your market — so you become a Super Seller. Starting at $79/mo.
hero.trust: Trusted by restaurants, contractors, locksmiths, and realtors. No contracts. Cancel anytime.

crewSection.heading: Seven Agents. Zero Overhead.
crewSection.description: Each crew member replaces an expensive hire or agency — so you focus on your craft while they handle the grind.

forge.tagline: Drop a link. Get a cinematic video.
forge.description: Stop paying $500+ per video. Paste any business URL — a property listing, a restaurant menu, a portfolio page — and Forge creates a cinematic AI video with your face composited in, music, and text overlays. Ready to post in minutes, not days.
features: Any business URL to video in minutes
AI face compositing in every scene

spoke.tagline: Your AI spokesperson. Voice in, video out.
spoke.description: Record a voice note, upload a photo, and get a professional spokesperson video delivered to your WhatsApp. Spoke writes the script and creates a lip-synced avatar of you speaking. Announce specials, explain services, pitch customers — without ever stepping in front of a camera.
features: Voice note + photo to spokesperson video

frontdesk.tagline: Never miss a call. AI answers 24/7.
frontdesk.description: Every missed call is a lost customer. FrontDesk answers every call with natural voice AI, captures lead details, books appointments, and routes urgent calls to you. From missed calls to booked appointments — around the clock.

scout.tagline: Qualified leads delivered to your WhatsApp.
scout.description: Stop relying on word-of-mouth alone. Scout finds potential customers in your niche, qualifies them with AI scoring, and delivers warm leads straight to your WhatsApp or CRM. From chasing referrals to a predictable lead pipeline.

buzz.description: From zero posts to a professional social media presence. Buzz generates on-brand content with AI text and images, sends it to your WhatsApp for one-tap approval, and publishes to Facebook and Instagram automatically. You approve. Buzz handles the rest.

cortex.tagline: Your business brain, always up to date.
cortex.description: Stop answering the same questions over and over. Cortex ingests your documents, SOPs, and brand materials, then answers questions from your team or customers with accurate, sourced responses. Your entire business knowledge, always available.

market.description: From one listing a day to hundreds while you sleep. Market generates unique product listings with AI copy, professional images, and location rotation across 30+ cities. Perfect for businesses selling physical products who want to dominate Facebook Marketplace.

industries.heading: Your Industry. Your Crew.
industries.description: From overwhelmed operator to dominant market presence. Custom AI solutions for your niche.

roi.description: SuperSeller AI replaces expensive agencies, freelancers, and staff with AI agents that work faster and cost a fraction.
roi.summary: Example: A realtor creating 10 listing videos/mo saves ~$5,000 compared to a video studio.

pricing.description: Buy credits, use them on any crew member. No per-tool subscriptions. No hidden fees. Mix and match however you need.

starter.tagline: Perfect for getting started with your AI crew

pro.tagline: For businesses ready to scale with AI

team.tagline: A full AI department for your business

items.q: What are credits and how do they work?
items.a: Credits are your universal currency across all crew members. Each task costs a set number of credits — for example, a listing video costs ~50 credits, a marketplace listing costs ~25 credits, a phone call costs ~5 credits. Buy a plan, use credits on any combination of services you need.

items.q: Do I need to use all crew members?
items.a: No. Use whichever agents solve your biggest problems. A realtor might only use Forge and FrontDesk. A contractor might focus on Market and Scout. Your credits work across all of them.

items.q: How is this different from hiring freelancers?
items.a: Freelancers cost more, take days, and require back-and-forth. Your AI crew works in minutes, 24/7, with zero project management overhead. A single listing video that costs $300–$800 from a studio costs ~50 credits here.

items.q: Can I try before I commit?
items.a: Contact us for a demo with your actual business data. We'll show you exactly what each crew member produces for your specific industry.
Credits never expire as long as you maintain an active subscription. They roll over month to month.
Yes. Each business gets isolated data. We use enterprise-grade PostgreSQL with row-level security, encrypted storage on Cloudflare R2, and never share your content or business data.

items.q: Which crew members are live right now?
items.a: Forge (video producer), Spoke (spokesperson), Buzz (content creator), and Market (marketplace automation) are fully live and producing content today. FrontDesk, Scout, and Cortex are launching soon — join now to be first in line.

items.q: Do I own the content that's created?
items.a: Yes. Every video, post, and asset created by your AI crew is 100% yours. Download in any format, use anywhere, no watermarks.
